response:
```sql
WITH monthly_signups AS (
    SELECT
        DATE_TRUNC('month', created_at) AS month,
        COUNT(id) AS new_signups
    FROM
        users
    GROUP BY
        DATE_TRUNC('month', created_at)
),
monthly_growth AS (
    SELECT
        month,
        new_signups,
        LAG(new_signups) OVER (ORDER BY month) AS prev_month_signups
    FROM
        monthly_signups
)
SELECT
    month,
    new_signups,
    prev_month_signups,
    CASE
        WHEN prev_month_signups = 0 THEN NULL
        ELSE (new_signups - prev_month_signups) * 1.0 / prev_month_signups
    END AS growth_rate
FROM
    monthly_growth
ORDER BY
    month;
```
